text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello-lo, you called? It's me, Big Sis Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, are you hiding? I know it's embarrassing
when you call someone the wrong thing, but I
want to see you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Three Goddesses? I don't suppose you've
seen a shy kid around here?
